features: Alberto Balsam Tea Tree Tingle Conditioner Case of 6
Enriched with tea tree oil for a refreshing tingle sensation.
Provides nourishment and hydration to the hair.
Leaves hair feeling soft, smooth, and manageable.
Helps to invigorate the scalp and promote healthy hair growth.
Suitable for daily use on all hair types.
description: Product Description Experience a refreshing and invigorating hair care routine with Alberto Balsam Tea Tree Tingle Conditioner. This 350ml conditioner, available in a convenient case of six, is infused with natural tea tree oil and peppermint extract, delivering a tingling sensation that revitalizes your scalp and awakens your senses. Enriched with pro-vitamin B5, it strengthens and moisturizes your hair, enhancing manageability and leaving it soft and smooth. Suitable for all hair types, including normal and dry hair, this silicone-free formula detangles and nourishes without weighing hair down, promoting natural shine and bounce. Enjoy salon-quality results at an affordable price with this great value pack. ​ Ingredients Aqua, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Amodimethicone, Benzophenone-4, Cetrimonium Chloride, Dimethicone, Disodium EDTA, DMDM Hydantoin, Lactic acid, Magnesium chloride, Magnesium Nitrate, Maltodextrin, Melaleuca Alternifolia Leaf Oil, Mentha Piperita Leaf Extract, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone, Panthenol, Pantolactone, Parfum, PEG-150 Distearate, PEG-7 Propylheptyl Ether, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium chloride, CI 15985, CI 19140, CI 42090 Directions After you've shampooed, use a good size dollop of conditioner. We find it works best to leave it on for 1-2 minutes. Rinse hair thoroughly. Ta-da, fabulously soft, shiny hair. Try not to get any shampoo in your eyes but if you do rinse thoroughly with water.
